title: 3D Minecraft Dungeons Mace
description: Changes the mace into a 3D model of the mace from Minecraft Dungeons.
body: If you love Minecraft Dungeons, and love the mace, (or just love Minecraft Dungeons lol) this pack is perfect for you. The 3D model for this weapon is almost identicle to Minecraft Dungeon's mace, and looks very nice. It is also small in your hand, so it won't obstruct the screen when you're playing competitive mace PvP.
